chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4287 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.19780/2023 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 14.10.2025 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Rizvi, advocate for petitioner Ms. Wajiha Maryam Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, A.A.G. Syed Israr Hussain, Law Officer, Universities & Boards Deptt./Respondent 9 Mr. Muhammad Sohail Imran & Khadim Hussain, Law Officers, SZABUL ------------------------------------------ Secretary, Universities & Boards Department, Government of Sindh, has issued Notification dated 02nd October, 2025, whereby Justice (Retd.) Mrs. Kausar Sultana Hussain has been appointed Vice Chancellor, Shaheed Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto University of Law for a period of four years on usual terms and conditions, as such, this petition has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
